mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate above 8.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investor confidence weakens.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite UNRATE > 8.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and declines in the federal funds rate signal stagflationary pressures, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days due to heightened uncertainty.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where both CPIAUCSL > 225 and FEDFUNDS < 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts (HOUST) above 750k signals strong consumer demand and economic optimism, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite HOUST > 750k.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 98.0 indicates robust supply-side growth, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as corporate earnings improve.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO remains above 98.0.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) above 130k and declines in unemployment (UNRATE) below 8.0% signal a strong labor market, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where both PAYEMS > 130k and UNRATE < 8.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in retail sales (RSAFS) above 403.9 billion dollars signals strong consumer demand, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as corporate revenues rise.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite RSAFS > 403.9B.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in CPI inflation above 0.5% signals rising price pressures, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as central banks signal tighter policy.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL increased > 0.5% in prior month.
